title: Understand Express Middleware
content: Wrote a custom logger middleware to track incoming API requests and response times.

title: Setup MongoDB Atlas
content: Created a new free-tier cluster, secured the database with a strong password, and configured network access.

title: Implement JWT Authentication
content: Added login and register routes. Successfully generating and verifying JSON Web Tokens for protected endpoints.

title: Deep Dive into the Event Loop
content: Studied the different phases of the Node.js event loop. Clarified the difference between setImmediate and setTimeout.

title: Refactor Project Structure
content: Moved controllers, routes, and models into separate directories for better modularity and separation of concerns.

title: Dockerize the Application
content: Created a multi-stage Dockerfile and a docker-compose.yml file to easily spin up the app and database locally.

title: Review React Hooks
content: Practiced using useEffect and useState in a small sandbox frontend project to consume the new Node.js APIs.

title: Deploy to VPS
content: Set up Nginx as a reverse proxy, installed SSL certificates with Certbot, and used PM2 to keep the Node process running continuously.
